nasb.text: For he will be like a bush in the desert And will not see when prosperity comes, But will live in stony wastes in the wilderness, A land of salt without inhabitant.

esv.text: He is like a shrub in the desert, and shall not see any good come. He shall dwell in the parched places of the wilderness, in an uninhabited salt land.

cnv.text: 他必像沙漠中的灌木， 福樂來到，他也必看不見， 卻要住在曠野乾旱之地、 無人居住的鹹地。

ccb.text: 这样的人毫无福乐， 像沙漠中的灌木。 他要住在旷野中干旱无人的盐碱地。
